parameters.jsCode: const input=$json; if(!input.event_id||!input.client_id||!input.workflow_name) throw new Error('Incomplete execution envelope'); return [{json:{...input,status:'success',records_processed:Number(input.records_processed??0),records_failed:0,workflow_steps:input.workflow_steps??[],entity_refs:input.entity_refs??[]}}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { event_id: $json.event_id, client_id: $json.client_id, feature_type: $json.feature_type ?? 'workflow_automation', workflow_name: $json.workflow_name, status: $json.status, n8n_workflow_id: $workflow.id, records_processed: $json.records_processed, records_failed: 0, workflow_steps: $json.workflow_steps, entity_refs: $json.entity_refs, metadata: { reporter: 'shared-runtime' } } }}
